## Problem being solved

<!-- What pain point or gap does this address?
     e.g. "When I ask Aiden to summarise a PDF, it can't handle files > 10 MB" -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- Describe what you'd like to happen. Be as specific as you can.
     If you have a rough design or API shape in mind, include it here. -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you think about and why did you rule them out? -->

## Who benefits

- [ ] Just me (my specific workflow)
- [ ] My team / organisation
- [ ] Most Aiden users

## Are you willing to implement this?

- [ ] Yes — I'd like to open a PR
- [ ] Partially — I can help with design/testing but not code
- [ ] No — flagging it for the maintainer

## Additional context

<!-- Links, mockups, prior art, related issues -->
